properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v1 v2 v5 v6 v1 v7 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For me and my house We're gonna serve You For me and my house You'll get the praise For me and my house We're gonna love You always

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For me and my house We're gonna worship For me and my house You'll get Your way For me and my house We're gonna love You always

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We have set our homes apart for You Let Your glory come and fill each room Pour out Your peace move in Your strength Flood with Your healing stream We have set our homes apart for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We declare our homes are holy ground Sons and daughters are arising now Let the young see let the old dream Till joy has been released We declare our homes are holy ground.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I speak to the enemy You can't have my family 'Cause we belong to the Lord With Heaven's authority We take back our destiny 'Cause we belong to the Lord.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Yes we belong to the Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For me and my house We're gonna love You always
